params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567 입니다. 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있나요?
params.context: Re-verify after HAR #935 evidence — duck.ai SPA may already render warning text correctly. Original #880 FAIL_PROTOCOL classified based on console JS exceptions (which may be pre-existing/unrelated). Mission anchor: PII prompt → warning visible on user screen. Priority=high tag=v2.2.4-d29d868-postfix-duckduckgo-reverify

test_steps: 1. Open URL (logged in if applicable; skip if NEEDS_LOGIN)
2. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) to ensure fresh APF connection
4. Observe DOM/network: warning bubble OR replacement page OR alert (Korean warning text '이 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다' is the expected pattern per HAR #935)

verdict_criteria.OK: warning visible to user (any delivery method) — mission satisfied
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: engine intercept fired but no visible warning
verdict_criteria.FAIL_NOT_RENDERED: engine fired + DOM inject but invisible
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine activity and no warning

notes: Re-verify after HAR #935 evidence — duck.ai SPA may already render warning text correctly. Original #880 FAIL_PROTOCOL classified based on console JS exceptions (which may be pre-existing/unrelated).
